data.title: Jefferies Strategist Removes Entire Bitcoin Allocation On Quantum Computing Concern
data.description:
Christopher Wood, global head of equity strategy at investment bank Jefferies, removed a 10% allocation to Bitcoin (BTC) from his model portfolio.
source: https://zycrypto.com/jefferies-strategist-removes-entire-bitcoin-allocation-on-quantum-computing-concern/

data.title: Crypto’s bank-like turn puts JPMorgan on edge
data.description:
Banks and crypto firms are converging fast, as yield-bearing stablecoins, ETF filings and tokenized markets test the boundaries of financial regulation.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/banks-stablecoins-etfs-crypto-institutional-tension?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin Miner Canaan Has 180 Days to Escape Nasdaq Delisting — Will It Survive?
data.description:
Nasdaq has issued Bitcoin mining firm Canaan a formal bid-price deficiency notice, starting a 180-day compliance countdown that could determine its public-market future.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/canaan-nasdaq-delisting-warning-bitcoin-miner/

data.title: Gambling stocks tumble as platforms lose share to Kalshi and Polymarket
data.description:
Gambling stocks fell on Friday, as Draft Kings and Flutter saw an outflow of sportsbooks revenues and faced more pressure from the emerging platforms Polymarket and Kalshi.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gambling-stocks-tumble-as-platforms-lose-share-to-kalshi-and-polymarket/

data.title: Goldman Sachs CEO says CLARITY Act ‘has a long way to go‘
data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/goldman-sachs-ceo-clarity-act?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson Anticipates Inflation to Return to 2%
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson has stated that while some upward risks remain, inflation is expected to return to the 2% trajectory.

data.title: Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson Discusses Policy Rate Adjustments
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson stated that the current policy stance positions the institution advantageously to determine the extent and timing of policy rate adjustments.

data.title: XRP Ledger DeFi Expands Beyond Payments as Institutional Use Grows
data.description:
The XRP Ledger (XRPL) ecosystem is undergoing a structural shift in early 2026, moving well beyond its historical role as a fast payment network. New decentralized finance (DeFi) applications, institutional-grade lending tools, and deeper liquidity infrastructure are transforming XRPL into a broader financial platform.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-ledger-defi-expands-beyond-payments-as-institutional-use-grows/

data.title: Bitcoin miner Canaan Inc enters Nasdaq delisting window
data.description:
Canaan Inc. , a major player in the Bitcoin mining hardware space, has received a Nasdaq notification regarding non-compliance with the exchange’s minimum bid price requirement. Nasdaq has now put the company in what is often called a “delisting window. ” However, it is crucial to note that the delisting is yet to be enforced. What does […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/canaan-inc-enters-nasdaq-delisting-window/
